title: JV-07 - NLLB-200-distilled quality-ceiling benchmark as non-default candidate

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

body:
## Summary

Benchmark NLLB-200-distilled-600M as a quality ceiling while preserving the non-commercial license blocker.

## Why is this needed?

NLLB may show how much quality is possible, but CC-BY-NC prevents it from becoming the shipped default without a new legal decision.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- NLLB-200-distilled model card and CC-BY-NC license.
- Benchmark harness and corpus.
- License review from JV-01.

## Outputs

- Research-only benchmark artifact clearly marked non-default.
- Quality ceiling comparison against Google, OPUS-MT, and M2M100.
- Legal blocker note for release planning.

## Implementation approach

- Run only if model download and runtime conversion are feasible.
- Mark artifacts as research-only and not eligible for bundled commercial default.
- Use results to decide whether OPUS-MT quality gap is acceptable.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Artifact marks candidate as non-default/license-blocked.
- [ ] Quality and latency are comparable to other candidates.
- [ ] No release packaging task depends on bundling NLLB unless legal status changes.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Artifact validator enforces candidate eligibility flags.
- [ ] License text is not misrepresented in docs.
- [ ] Redaction scan passes.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-01, JV-02, JV-03.
- Informs JV-08 but should not block if license prevents use.

## Agent routing

Research/performance agent; security/legal-style review for license note.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-07
- Wave: M3 candidate
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: research, area: providers, provider: local, area: verification, priority:P1, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

New quality ceiling issue; not a duplicate of closed #372.
